projectile.source: US Army NGSW 6.8x51mm (.277 Fury) 135gr EPR. MV ~915 m/s from 406mm barrel (SAAMI spec 80 ksi chamber pressure). G7 BC ~0.206 per Litz estimate for 135gr .277 caliber projectile. Caliber .277in = 7.04mm. Hybrid brass/steel case.

fragmentation.notes: EPR construction: copper jacket, steel penetrator, fragmented core. Similar fragmentation behavior to M855A1/M80A1.
